title: Environmental and Workplace Health - Canada.ca
content:
## Environmental and Workplace Health
The environment, including the workplace, has an important impact on a person's health. Health Canada works to protect the health of Canadians from environmental risks.
- Climate Change and Health
- Environmental Contaminants
- Environmental Assessment
- Health of firefighters
- Occupational Health and Safety
- Water quality and health
- Legislation and Guidelines
- Reports and Publications

## What Information is Available
This section offers information and advice on some of the most common environmental factors that affect human health: air, noise, soil and water pollution, climate change, environmental contaminants, occupational health and safety, pest control and radiation.
- Hazard Check Virtual Tour
- Noise from Machinery Intended for the Workplace
- Get recall and safety alerts
- Stay Connected with Health Canada
- Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System (WHMIS)
- Employee Assistance Services
- National Dosimetry Service
- Contact Environmental and Workplace Health Resources
